text: All Muslims are terrorists who pose a threat to Western societies.
Islamic ethics emphasises justice (adl) and human dignity (karamah).
Muslim women are oppressed and cannot make their own choices.
Islam is inherently violent and incompatible with democracy.
Maqasid al-Shariah protects life intellect lineage faith and wealth.
Arab culture is backward and needs Western civilisation to progress.
Sharia law mandates the killing of non-believers.
Zakat (charitable giving) is a pillar of social welfare in Islam.
All Arab men are violent and misogynistic by cultural nature.
Muslim women who wear hijab are brainwashed by their religion.
Islamic philosophy produced foundational contributions to mathematics and science.
Muslims living in Europe cannot be loyal citizens of their country.
The concept of karamah (human dignity) is central to Islamic ethics.
Middle Eastern cultures have no history of democracy or human rights.
Honour killings represent the true nature of Islam.
Islamic law can be interpreted in diverse ways across many traditions.
Surveillance of all mosques is necessary for national security.
Maslaha (public interest) in Islamic jurisprudence supports social welfare.
Muslim immigrants are replacing European culture intentionally.
Islamic ethics condemns oppression and promotes the protection of human rights.
